SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[release-hygiene-strict] active: release workflow and changelog quality checks are mandatory.'"

UserPromptSubmit.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[release-hygiene-strict] enforce: venv-in-command, flat user-benefit changelog bullets, and no sensitive data.'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[release-hygiene-strict] gate: final response must report release validation checks and skipped items.'"
